prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（原理科）最低位次分别为约 10947→18429→10502→12682→12881 名，2022 年因省控线变化出现大幅波动后，近 3 年趋于后移，2025 年基准约 12881 名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划 2021 年 81 人、2022 年 83 人、2023 年 80 人、2024 年 80 人、2025 年 81 人，2026 年计划增至 104 人，较 2025 年扩招约 28.4%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所缓解但位次数字仍受其他因素影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名在 48–61 名之间波动，整体稳定在中游偏上水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；第 五轮学科评估；该校传统优势在地质学、地质资源与地质工程等领域，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，对理工类院校整体报考热度有正向拉动；甘肃省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 218700 人，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 179817 人明显增加，按近年物理类占比约 66%–68% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 144000–149000 人，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近 3 年持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+28.4%）缓解竞争、以及本省物理类考生总数明显增加（约 +20%）加剧竞争，两相抵消后竞争仍略加剧；在 2025 年基准 12881 名基础上预测最低位次约 15275 名，区间 14775–15775 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (formerly Science) were approximately 10947→18429→10502→12682→12881. In 2022, there was a significant fluctuation due to changes in the provincial control line, but in the past 3 years, the rankings have shifted backward, with a baseline of about 12881 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province was 81 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 81 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 104, an expansion of about 28.4% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, easing competition, but the ranking numbers are still affected by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 61, overall stable at the upper-middle level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, its traditional strengths lie in geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, which have a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, positively driving the overall application heat for science and engineering universities. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province is about 218,700, a significant increase from the combined total of about 179,817 for Physics and History categories in 2025. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category students (about 66%–68%), it is estimated that there will be about 144,000–149,000 Physics Category examinees in 2026, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the past 3 years, the significant expansion in 2026 (+28.4%) easing competition, and the notable increase in the total number of Physics Category examinees in the province (about +20%) intensifying competition, the net effect is a slight intensification of competition. Based on the 2025 baseline of 12881, the predicted minimum ranking is about 15275, with a range of 14775–15775.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Geophysics (National Top Talent Program)
- Geology (National Top Talent Program, National Science Base Class)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Automation (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Automation)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Geology (Resource Exploration Engineering, Petroleum Engineering)
- Geographical Sciences (Geography, Geographic Information Science)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Engineering Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Chemistry)
- Applied Chemistry
- Physics
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology)
- English
- Business Administration (Business Administration (Bilingual Teaching Class), Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14775–15775, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14775), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Geophysics Top Talent Program. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>15775), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) were approximately 1688→1690→1652→1904→1922, with 2021–2023 basically stable in the 1650–1690 range, and 2024–2025 clearly shifting back to around 1900, with a cumulative shift of about 250 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1922; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu for History Category was 10 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 14 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and a sharp reduction to 6 in 2026, a decrease of about 57.1% compared to 2025, a very large reduction, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 56th, with stable rankings in the upper-middle range in recent years; the university's reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation; the university is strong in science and engineering, with relatively few liberal arts programs, and overall application popularity is limited by the university type.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature is divided and wait-and-see, with the overall liberal arts application environment stable; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, and based on the recent proportion of History Category at about 32%–34%, the estimated number of History Category examinees in 2026 is about 70,000–74,000, a significant increase (about +20%) compared to 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the last 2 years, the sharp reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-57.1%) leading to sharply intensified competition, and the significant increase in the total number of History Category examinees in the province (about +20%), the triple pressure will cause the ranking to significantly move forward (number decreases); based on the 2025 baseline of 1922, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1213, with a range of 995–1431.
